title: Limitations
full_text:
3.4.1.2 Limitations
Limitations
1) Notwithstanding application of the performance path provisions, Article 3.2.1.1.
and Subsection 3.2.4. shall apply.

sentences.text: Notwithstanding application of the performance path provisions, Article 3.2.1.1. and Subsection 3.2.4. shall apply.
